parameters.query: ={{ 'SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.filename, p.subject, p.assessment_type, p.num_questions, p.paper_text, p.word_count, p.page_count, r.parsed_json as rubric_json, r.programme, r.module_name, r.total_marks FROM papers p LEFT JOIN tokens t ON (t.draft_paper_id = p.id OR t.final_paper_id = p.id) LEFT JOIN rubrics r ON t.rubric_id = r.id WHERE p.id = ' + $json.body.paper_id + ' LIMIT 1;' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 8192, system: $json.system_prompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.user_message }] }) }}

parameters.query: ={{ 'INSERT INTO evaluations (paper_id, mode, draft_or_final, overall_score, knowledge_score, critical_score, application_score, referencing_score, structure_score, ai_risk_score, report_html) VALUES (' + $json.paper_id + ', \'' + $json.mode + '\', \'draft\', ' + $json.overall_score + ', ' + $json.knowledge_score + ', ' + $json.critical_score + ', ' + $json.application_score + ', ' + $json.referencing_score + ', ' + $json.structure_score + ', ' + $json.ai_risk_score + ', \'' + $json.report_html + '\') RETURNING id;' }}

={{ $json.skip ? 'SELECT 1' : 'INSERT INTO evaluation_issues (evaluation_id, category, severity, what_issue, where_in_paper, why_chain, root_cause, how_to_fix, who_notices, description, recommendation, example_before, example_after) VALUES (' + $json.evaluation_id + ', \'' + $json.category + '\', \'' + $json.severity + '\', \'' + $json.what_issue + '\', \'' + $json.where_in_paper + '\', \'' + $json.why_chain + '\'::jsonb, \'' + $json.root_cause + '\', \'' + $json.how_to_fix + '\', \'' + $json.who_notices + '\', \'' + $json.description + '\', \'' + $json.recommendation + '\', \'' + $json.example_before + '\', \'' + $json.example_after + '\');' }}

={{ $json.skip ? 'SELECT 1' : 'INSERT INTO evaluation_strengths (evaluation_id, category, what_well, where_in_paper, why_chain, reusable_pattern, how_it_helps, who_notices) VALUES (' + $json.evaluation_id + ', \'' + $json.category + '\', \'' + $json.what_well + '\', \'' + $json.where_in_paper + '\', \'' + $json.why_chain + '\'::jsonb, \'' + $json.reusable_pattern + '\', \'' + $json.how_it_helps + '\', \'' + $json.who_notices + '\');' }}

={{ $json.skip ? 'SELECT 1' : 'INSERT INTO consistency_checks (evaluation_id, location_a, location_b, description, verdict, explanation, recommendation) VALUES (' + $json.evaluation_id + ', \'' + $json.location_a + '\', \'' + $json.location_b + '\', \'' + $json.description + '\', \'' + $json.verdict + '\', \'' + $json.explanation + '\', \'' + $json.recommendation + '\');' }}

={{ $json.skip ? 'SELECT 1' : 'INSERT INTO reference_audit (evaluation_id, citation, source_type, matched, issue_type) VALUES (' + $json.evaluation_id + ', \'' + $json.citation + '\', \'' + $json.source_type + '\', ' + $json.matched + ', ' + ($json.issue_type ? '\'' + $json.issue_type + '\'' : 'NULL') + ');' }}

={{ $json.token_code ? 'UPDATE tokens SET ' + ($node['Build Prompt'].json.mode === 'final' ? 'final_evaluation_id' : 'draft_evaluation_id') + ' = ' + $json.evaluation_id + ', status = CASE WHEN draft_evaluation_id IS NULL THEN \'draft_evaluated\' ELSE \'final_evaluated\' END WHERE code = \'' + $json.token_code + '\';' : 'SELECT 1;' }}

={{ $json.skip_email ? 'SELECT null as email, null as draft_or_final' : "SELECT email, CASE WHEN final_evaluation_id = " + $json.evaluation_id + " THEN 'final' ELSE 'draft' END as draft_or_final FROM tokens WHERE code = '" + ($json.token_code || '').replace(/'/g, '') + "'" }}

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.draft_or_final === 'final' ? 'Your Final Report & Comparison is Ready!' : 'Your Draft Report is Ready!' }}
parameters.text:
={{ $json.draft_or_final === 'final' ? 'Hi there!

Your final evaluation is complete. View your full report and comparison with your draft:

https://beegraded.co.za/t/' + $node['Check Email Needed'].json.token_code + '

Your token journey is now complete. Create an account to save your work:
https://beegraded.co.za/get-started

— BeeGraded Team' : 'Hi there!

Your draft evaluation is complete! View your full report:

https://beegraded.co.za/t/' + $node['Check Email Needed'].json.token_code + '

When you're ready, upload your final version for a comparison report:
https://beegraded.co.za/t/' + $node['Check Email Needed'].json.token_code + '/final

— BeeGraded Team' }}
